title: Spicy Kebap Rice Krispie Bites
description: A unique fusion of traditional rice krispie treats and spicy kebap inspired flavors.
instructions: Line a 9x9-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the marshmallows and stir until completely melted.
Remove from heat and stir in the Rice Krispies, kebap spice mix, and sugar until well combined.
Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
If using walnuts, sprinkle on top.
Let cool and cut into bars.
